introduction: SYNOPSISYang-sun was only married for three days when her husband, Kim Dae-po, took all their possessions and ran away. She is in Seoul searching for her husband when she meets Mrs. Kang. With her help, Yang-sun sets up an illegal cafe' but is caught by the law. Mrs. Kang and Yang-sun go their separate ways. Yang-sun then meets Ji-kyung. She accepts the 'arranged' proposal by Ji-kyung's parents and marries Ji-kyung. She even treats his parents as if they were her own but they introduce Yang-sun to a Japanese, Nakamura , to be his mistress. Yang-sun is now well off materialistically but feels the decay of her mental state. Then she runs into Kim Dae-po who is now a chauffeur and she is able to return to her old simple self and find new love again.故事找到蒸大炮已经三天后逃离婚姻财产yangsun徘徊尔闭门开会gangyeosa charina咖啡厅需要颓废的销售镇压。分手gangyeosa yangsun满足海岸即将成为一个伎俩曾经结婚的父母，因为他们的亲生父母或引入yangsun到村政府。只有豪华ropji找到自己的精神要由新长出一蹶不振变成爱自己那么谁被引入到热气腾腾的大炮司机幼稚。
